title: HEALTH CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: SISKIYOU COMMUNITY HEALTH CLINIC CAVE JUNCTION HEALTH CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary, patient-centered medical care for adults and children, as well as mental health evaluations, immunizations, pregnancy testing, prenatal services, and drug and alcohol assessments. Established patients can also access low cost prescriptions on-site. Also assists in applying for the Oregon Health Plan and private insurances on the Federal Health Exchange. 25647 Redwood Highway Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 472-4777 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 472-4777 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Josephine County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Childhood Immunization Community Clinics General Medical Care Mental Health Evaluation Navigator Programs Prenatal Care Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SISKIYOU COMMUNITY HEALTH CLINIC CAVE JUNCTION
